python_basics.name: Python Basics
python_basics.description: Variables, data types, control flow, functions, and basic I/O in Python.

python_oop.name: Python OOP
python_oop.description: Classes, inheritance, encapsulation, polymorphism, and dunder methods.

python_advanced.name: Advanced Python
python_advanced.description: Decorators, generators, async/await, type hints, and performance profiling.

javascript_basics.name: JavaScript Basics
javascript_basics.description: Core JS syntax, DOM manipulation, events, ES6+ features, and fetch API.

javascript_advanced.name: Advanced JavaScript
javascript_advanced.description: Closures, prototypes, promises, async/await, modules, and design patterns.

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.description: Static typing, interfaces, generics, decorators, and tsconfig setup.

algorithms_and_ds.name: Algorithms & Data Structures
algorithms_and_ds.description: Arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, sorting, searching, and complexity analysis.

sql_basics.name: SQL Fundamentals
sql_basics.description: SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY, indexes, subqueries, and relational schema design.

advanced_sql.name: Advanced SQL & Query Optimisation
advanced_sql.description: Window functions, CTEs, execution plans, query tuning, and stored procedures.

rest_api_design.name: REST API Design
rest_api_design.description: HTTP verbs, status codes, OpenAPI spec, versioning, pagination, and auth.

testing_fundamentals.name: Testing Fundamentals
testing_fundamentals.description: Unit tests, integration tests, mocking, TDD, and coverage measurement.

system_design.name: System Design
system_design.description: Scalability, load balancing, caching, CAP theorem, and distributed patterns.

numpy.name: NumPy
numpy.description: N-dimensional arrays, broadcasting, vectorised operations, and linear algebra.

pandas.name: Pandas
pandas.description: DataFrames, Series, data cleaning, merging, groupby, and time-series handling.

data_visualisation.name: Data Visualisation
data_visualisation.description: Matplotlib, Seaborn, and Plotly for exploratory analysis and presentation charts.

statistics.name: Statistics & Probability
statistics.description: Distributions, hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and Bayesian thinking.

machine_learning_fundamentals.name: Machine Learning Fundamentals
machine_learning_fundamentals.description: Supervised/unsupervised learning, evaluation metrics, bias-variance tradeoff.

deep_learning.name: Deep Learning
deep_learning.description: Neural networks, backpropagation, CNNs, RNNs, and training at scale.

nlp_basics.name: NLP Basics
nlp_basics.description: Tokenisation, embeddings, TF-IDF, text classification, and sentiment analysis.

mlops.name: MLOps
mlops.description: Model serving, experiment tracking, feature stores, drift detection, and CI for ML.

data_engineering.name: Data Engineering
data_engineering.description: ETL pipelines, Apache Spark, Airflow, data lakes, and streaming with Kafka.

linux_cli.name: Linux & Command Line
linux_cli.description: Shell scripting, file system, process management, cron jobs, and SSH.

git_basics.name: Git & Version Control
git_basics.description: Branching, merging, rebasing, pull requests, and collaborative Git workflows.

docker.name: Docker
docker.description: Images, containers, Dockerfiles, volumes, networks, and Docker Compose.

kubernetes.name: Kubernetes
kubernetes.description: Pods, deployments, services, ConfigMaps, Helm charts, and cluster management.

ci_cd.name: CI/CD Pipelines
ci_cd.description: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, pipeline design, automated testing, and deployments.

infrastructure_as_code.name: Infrastructure as Code
infrastructure_as_code.description: Terraform, Pulumi, and CloudFormation for reproducible cloud environments.

monitoring_observability.name: Monitoring & Observability
monitoring_observability.description: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, distributed tracing, and SLO/SLA design.

devsecops.name: DevSecOps
devsecops.description: OWASP Top 10, SAST/DAST tools, secrets management, and security gates in CI/CD.

cloud_fundamentals.name: Cloud Fundamentals
cloud_fundamentals.description: Compute, storage, networking, IAM, and pricing models across major cloud providers.

aws_core.name: AWS Core Services
aws_core.description: EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, VPC, IAM, and CloudWatch on Amazon Web Services.

gcp_core.name: GCP Core Services
gcp_core.description: Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, BigQuery, Cloud Run, and GKE on Google Cloud.

azure_core.name: Azure Core Services
azure_core.description: Virtual Machines, Blob Storage, Azure SQL, Functions, and Azure DevOps.

serverless.name: Serverless Architecture
serverless.description: Functions-as-a-Service, event-driven patterns, cold starts, and cost optimisation.

cloud_security.name: Cloud Security
cloud_security.description: IAM policies, network security groups, encryption, compliance, and zero-trust.

communication_fundamentals.name: Communication Fundamentals
communication_fundamentals.description: Active listening, clear verbal and written communication, and feedback skills.

technical_writing.name: Technical Writing
technical_writing.description: Writing clear documentation, runbooks, RFCs, and user-facing guides.

agile_scrum.name: Agile & Scrum
agile_scrum.description: Sprint planning, retrospectives, backlog grooming, and Agile ceremonies.

project_management.name: Project Management
project_management.description: Scope, timeline, risk management, stakeholder reporting, and delivery tracking.

team_leadership.name: Team Leadership
team_leadership.description: Mentoring, delegation, conflict resolution, 1-on-1s, and engineering culture.

stakeholder_management.name: Stakeholder Management
stakeholder_management.description: Identifying stakeholders, managing expectations, escalation, and executive reporting.

hr_fundamentals.name: HR Fundamentals
hr_fundamentals.description: Recruitment lifecycle, employee relations, onboarding, HR compliance, and labour law basics.

recruitment_and_talent.name: Recruitment & Talent Acquisition
recruitment_and_talent.description: Job profiling, sourcing, interviewing, offer management, and employer branding.

performance_management.name: Performance Management
performance_management.description: OKRs, KPIs, appraisal cycles, 360 feedback, and performance improvement plans.

financial_analysis.name: Financial Analysis
financial_analysis.description: P&L statements, balance sheets, cash flow, ratio analysis, and financial modelling.

accounting_basics.name: Accounting Basics
accounting_basics.description: Debits, credits, double-entry bookkeeping, trial balance, and basic journal entries.

budgeting_and_forecasting.name: Budgeting & Forecasting
budgeting_and_forecasting.description: Variance analysis, rolling forecasts, zero-based budgeting, and cost centre management.

supply_chain_basics.name: Supply Chain Fundamentals
supply_chain_basics.description: Procurement, inventory management, demand forecasting, logistics, and vendor management.

operations_management.name: Operations Management
operations_management.description: Process optimisation, lean/Six Sigma principles, capacity planning, and quality control.

customer_service.name: Customer Service Excellence
customer_service.description: Handling enquiries, complaint resolution, SLA adherence, CRM tools, and NPS management.

sales_fundamentals.name: Sales Fundamentals
sales_fundamentals.description: Prospecting, needs analysis, objection handling, closing techniques, and CRM hygiene.

marketing_basics.name: Marketing Fundamentals
marketing_basics.description: Market segmentation, buyer personas, content strategy, SEO basics, and campaign analytics.

healthcare_fundamentals.name: Healthcare Operations Fundamentals
healthcare_fundamentals.description: Clinical workflows, patient safety, HIPAA compliance, EMR systems, and healthcare quality.

microsoft_office.name: Microsoft Office Suite
microsoft_office.description: Excel (formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP), Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook for professional use.

data_literacy.name: Data Literacy & Business Intelligence
data_literacy.description: Reading dashboards, interpreting KPIs, basic analytics, and data-driven decision making.
